statement: This record remains negative evidence on build 26100: the repo did not produce enough supporting proof to promote it into a normal actionable surface.
gating_reason: Archived audit trail only. Keep this out of the normal tweak surface.

links.title: Existing Offline Files policy record
links.summary: The validated policy record documents the official feature control separately from this task bundle.

links.title: Current privacy provider task bundle
links.summary: The provider disables the Offline Files background and logon synchronization tasks.

links.title: Repo privacy docs for Offline Files scheduled tasks
links.summary: The repo docs state that disabling Offline Files turns off the two Offline Files scheduled tasks, and also describe the logon/background synchronization behavior in the Offline Files section.
